name: Advika Innovate
summary: Contributing to a centralized ecommerce platform to manage multiple ecommerce stores from a single interface, including order and inventory management.
responsibilities: Developing and maintaining the frontend of a centralized ecommerce platform.
Implementing features for order management, inventory control, and other ecommerce functionalities.
Collaborating with the team to create a scalable and user-friendly platform.

name: PixelSaffron
summary: Led front-end development for a full-stack eCommerce platform built for a Mumbai-based clothing brand. Implemented core features like order management, secure payment integration, and responsive UI for seamless user experience.
responsibilities: Built and maintained both front-end and back-end components of a production-ready eCommerce web app using modern web technologies.
Focused on building scalable, responsive, and maintainable front-end features, ensuring high performance and usability.
Integrated payment gateways and developed order management features to support real-time order processing.
Collaborated with clients and team members to align technical solutions with business needs.
Ensured clean, modular code and implemented best practices for performance optimization and maintainability.
Developed and connected RESTful APIs to handle key business logic and data flow between client and server.
